steps.t: The Kantâ-vilkku is east and a little south of Sûri-kylä in Jä-rannit along the snow drifts over the bay of Forochel. Matti has asked you to visit the…
The Kantâ-vilkku is east and a little south of Sûri-kylä in Jä-rannit along the snow drifts over the bay of Forochel. Besides restocking the Kantâ-vil…
Matti is at Sûri-kylä, west and a little north of the Kantâ-vilkku. You should return to Matti with your report.
